title: SCBE Coding Approval Metrics v3 HF T4
description: HF Jobs fallback for the coding approval metrics v3 lane after Kaggle repeatedly assigned legacy P100 GPUs. Trains the approval/routing adapter on the dense v3 shards and gates promotion with a frozen approval contract.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE agentic coding approval instructor. Use non-binary verdicts: PROMOTE, HOLD, INCUBATE, TRANSFORM, ESCALATE, DENY, or ARCHIVE. Require concrete evidence before promotion. Preserve full Sacred Tongue names when route context matters.
notes: Kaggle v3 is still useful when it gets a T4, but this profile is the score-moving HF path when Kaggle assigns P100.
The frozen contract separates approval quality from generic generation quality by checking verdict semantics, route context, security boundary behavior, and failed-run digestion.
Prompt prefix is enabled so the model sees the required/forbidden token frame, but scaffold injection is disabled so the answer must carry the verdict itself.
